title: EnumConfigFieldSchema
description: Defines an enum value integration config field.

display_name.description: user-friendly name of the configuration field.

description.description: Optional brief description of the configuration field.

required.description: Denotes whether the config field is a required value.

type.description: The field type of config value.

choices.description: List of enumerated choices that can be selected as the config field value.

value.description: The value represented by this option.

description.description: Optional brief description of the option.

default.description:
The default value for the config field.
Must reference the value of an option listed in `choices`.
